_comment: Hand-authored legendary actions, lair actions, and Legendary Resistance for a curated set of iconic high-CR monsters, keyed by the monster key in monsters.json. That dataset is generated by tools/extract-srd.py and carries no boss mechanics (the SRD 5.2.1 prose is truncated for legendary actions and has no lair actions at all), so this overlay is merged in by MonsterCatalog at load time — the same pattern as magic-item-effects.json. ATTACK actions reference an attack by name from the monster’s own stat block. Dragons share one action shape; only save DC (8 + proficiency + STR mod), Wing Attack damage, and the lair element differ by age and colour. SRD 5.2.1 content, CC-BY-4.0.

legendaryActions.name: Detect
legendaryActions.description: The dragon sweeps its gaze across the battlefield, searching for hidden foes.

legendaryActions.name: Tail Attack
legendaryActions.description: The dragon lashes out with its tail.

legendaryActions.name: Wing Attack
legendaryActions.description: The dragon beats its wings, buffeting everything nearby.

lairActions.name: Grasping Earth
lairActions.description: The ground churns and grasps at the dragon’s foes.

lairActions.name: Caustic Seep
lairActions.description: Acidic pools bubble up from the stone.

lairActions.name: Freezing Fog
lairActions.description: A rime-cold fog rolls across the ice.

legendaryActions.name: Cantrip
legendaryActions.description: The lich hurls a mote of raw arcane force.

legendaryActions.name: Paralyzing Touch
legendaryActions.description: The lich reaches out with a withering, grave-cold hand.

legendaryActions.name: Frightening Gaze
legendaryActions.description: The lich fixes its foes with the gaze of something long past death.

lairActions.name: Grasping Dead
lairActions.description: Skeletal hands erupt from the floor and clutch at the living.

lairActions.name: Soul Drain
lairActions.description: The phylactery pulses, and the chamber drinks the warmth from living flesh.

legendaryActions.name: Move
legendaryActions.description: The vampire moves with unnatural speed, feet never seeming to touch the ground.

legendaryActions.name: Grave Strike
legendaryActions.description: The vampire strikes with predatory grace.

legendaryActions.name: Charm
legendaryActions.description: The vampire’s gaze promises everything, and asks only obedience.

lairActions.name: Grasping Mist
lairActions.description: Tendrils of freezing mist coil around the vampire’s prey.

lairActions.name: Draining Shadows
lairActions.description: The shadows of the crypt reach out and feed.

legendaryActions.name: Tentacle Attack
legendaryActions.description: A tentacle lashes out of the dark water.

legendaryActions.name: Fling
legendaryActions.description: The kraken hurls a grasped creature away like so much flotsam.

legendaryActions.name: Lightning Strike
legendaryActions.description: A bolt of lightning arcs down from the storm above.

lairActions.name: Crushing Current
lairActions.description: A wall of black water slams through the depths.

lairActions.name: Freezing Water
lairActions.description: The sea turns abyssal-cold in an instant.

legendaryActions.name: Onslaught
legendaryActions.description: The tarrasque lumbers forward, and the earth complains beneath it.

legendaryActions.name: Tail Attack
legendaryActions.description: The tarrasque’s tail sweeps through everything behind it.

legendaryActions.name: Frightful Presence
legendaryActions.description: The tarrasque roars, and the sound is the end of the world.

legendaryActions.name: Detect
legendaryActions.description: The aboleth’s ancient mind sweeps the water for thoughts it has not yet tasted.

legendaryActions.name: Tail Swipe
legendaryActions.description: The aboleth’s tail lashes through the murk.

legendaryActions.name: Psychic Drain
legendaryActions.description: The aboleth feeds on memory, and takes more than it needs.

lairActions.name: Grasping Tide
lairActions.description: The water thickens to slime and drags at the aboleth’s enemies.

lairActions.name: Maddening Whispers
lairActions.description: Voices that are not voices speak the listener’s true name.

legendaryActions.name: Attack
legendaryActions.description: The mummy lord strikes with a fist of bound linen and old hate.

legendaryActions.name: Blinding Dust
legendaryActions.description: Grave dust billows from the mummy lord’s wrappings.

legendaryActions.name: Channel Negative Energy
legendaryActions.description: The mummy lord channels the cold of the tomb.

lairActions.name: Grasping Wrappings
lairActions.description: Loose linen erupts from the walls and winds tight.

lairActions.name: Choking Sand
lairActions.description: Sand pours from the ceiling, dry and hungry.
